hypothesis: Creating behavioral tests for all 8 ungoverned personas will close the specification-validation gap and ensure all personas can be verified against their intended behavior

plan.description: Create behavioral test suites for: default, skeptical-auditor, seldon, communal-steward, convolution-agent, critical-theorist, rational-administrator, recovery-agent, validator-reflector, virtuous-leader
plan.success_criteria: All 14 personas have at least 3 test cases each in tests/behavioral/
risks: Test cases may be too generic without real-world usage data
Some personas overlap in function making distinct tests challenging
